svg.title: Momentum CrewAI pipeline with portfolio monitor
svg.desc: Three-agent pipeline: Momentum Scout feeds Fundamental Analyst, Portfolio Monitor watches held positions

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how the Momentum Scout task works')
